Class IntLimitedPrompt

java.lang.Object
prompts.IntLimitedPrompt
All Implemented Interfaces:
Prompt<Integer>
public class IntLimitedPrompt extends Object implements Prompt<Integer>
Prompts for an integer.

  • Constructor Details

    • IntLimitedPrompt

      public IntLimitedPrompt(int minInclusive, int maxInclusive, String promptMessage, String errorMessage)
      Construct a new integer prompt.
      Parameters:
      minInclusive - The minimum integer allowed.
      maxInclusive - The maximum integer allowed.
      promptMessage - Message to show the user to request input.
      errorMessage - Message to show when user's input is bad.

    • request

      public void request(PrintStream out)
      Description copied from interface: Prompt
      Tell the user what you want.

      request in interface Prompt<Integer>
      Parameters:
      out - Output to write to.

    • receive

      public Integer receive(Scanner in) throws BadUserInputException
      Description copied from interface: Prompt
      Read a value.
      Specified by:
      receive in interface Prompt<Integer>
      Parameters:
      in - The input.
      Returns:
      The value read.
      Throws:
      BadUserInputException - Indicate that the user input was bad.
